title: thelypteris lucida
intro: Thelypteris lucida, also known as the glossy male fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The leaves of this plant have been traditionally used in medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris lucida include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris lucida may include infusions of the leaves to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
